summary: Iteration 5 re-verification: BOTH iteration-4 backend blockers are FIXED. (1) POST /api/players/register without body.email now returns 200 with auto-generated email '<...>@players.playsphere.app' (routable TLD) + httpOnly access_token cookie + UserPublic. (2) Legacy roster routes successfully renamed to /api/team-players/{id} (GET list, GET by id, POST, PATCH, DELETE) — confirmed in server.py lines 780-815. /api/players/me, /api/players/profiles, /api/players/profiles/{id} now reach proper handlers and all 12 previously-skipped TestPlayers tests pass. Full pytest regression: 93 passed / 0 skipped / 0 failed (across backend_test.py, test_multitenant.py, test_currency_catalog.py, test_vendor_player_settings.py). Frontend E2E with Playwright: Player A signup (mobile-only, no email field) -> /players/me with editor visible -> saved city/bio/jersey (toast 'Profile saved'). Player B signup -> searched directory -> opened A's profile -> view_count incremented to 1 (cross-user view confirmed). Backward compatibility verified: RegisterTeam.jsx, TeamDetail.jsx, PlayerDetail.jsx already call /team-players (frontend in sync) and TestTeamPlayers regression passes (list, create+get, patch RBAC). Auto-generated email displayed in Nav (player_<mobile>@players.playsphere.app) — works. Found and fixed 2 minor frontend bugs during retest (see updated_files).
action_items: OPTIONAL: AuthContext.jsx has no playerLogin/refresh method. PlayerSignup and PlayerLogin both work-around it via window.location.href hard reload. Cleaner: expose refreshUser() so SPA navigation works without full page reload.
OPTIONAL: server.py is now 2099 lines. Strongly consider splitting into routers/players.py, routers/vendors.py, routers/settings.py, routers/team_players.py to keep things maintainable.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering is now correct because /team-players uses a distinct prefix, but the original ordering pitfall is still a risk if anyone re-introduces /api/players/{...} CRUD. Suggest mounting player-account routes under an APIRouter(prefix='/player-accounts') to permanently isolate them from path-param collisions.

PATCH /api/players/me already strips id, user_id, mobile, view_count (verified by test_patch_cannot_change_mobile_view_count_or_user_id). Consider also stripping 'created_at' and 'company_name' for defense in depth (frontend already strips them).

PlayerSignup.jsx uses window.location.href hard reload after signup — works but is a code smell. AuthContext should expose a refreshUser() method or a playerLogin()/playerRegister() that updates user state.
/api/settings PATCH still does not validate URL scheme — malicious platform_admin could store javascript: URL. Add http(s)://-only validator.
GET /api/vendor-bookings for vendor still falls back to flt={'vendor_id':'__none__'} on missing vendor — silent empty list. Should raise 404 'Vendor not registered'.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_vendor_player_settings.py (un-skipped TestPlayers, flipped register-no-email assertion 500->200, fixed cookie name from session_token to access_token)
/app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (renamed legacy TestPlayers->TestTeamPlayers + endpoints /players->/team-players to match backend rename)
/app/frontend/src/pages/PlayerSignup.jsx (changed nav('/players/me') to window.location.href = '/players/me' so AuthContext refreshes after signup — matches PlayerLogin pattern)

/app/frontend/src/pages/PlayerProfile.jsx (Radix Select: replaced SelectItem value='' with sentinel '__none__' for the 'Independent' option to fix 'Uncaught runtime errors: Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string')

success_rate.frontend: 100% on player signup+profile+search+cross-user view; footer & platform-admin tabs still working as before

test_credentials: admin@playsphere.com / admin123, acme@example.com / acme123, ravi@turf.in / vendor123 (all verified). New ephemeral TEST_E2E_A_* and TEST_E2E_B_* players created with random mobile.
seed_data_creation: Created several ephemeral TEST_E2E_* players (mobile auto-generated) — these remain in DB. Created TEST_NoEmail_* registration via pytest. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration-4 blockers are fully resolved. Backend regression 93/93 green, frontend player flow end-to-end (signup -> editor -> save -> search -> cross-user view -> view_count++) verified in browser. Two minor frontend fixes were applied by the testing agent during retest (PlayerSignup hard-reload after register; PlayerProfile Independent SelectItem sentinel) — both follow patterns already in the codebase. Optional cleanup items only (see critical_code_review_comments).
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE FOR ORIGINAL BUGS: (1) auto-gen email used '.local' TLD which Pydantic EmailStr rejects -> fixed by switching to '@players.playsphere.app'. (2) Path-parameter route /api/players/{player_id} declared before /api/players/me shadowed the literal route -> fixed by renaming the legacy roster CRUD to /api/team-players/{player_id}. Both fixes verified at code level (server.py L780-815 and L1264) and at runtime via the un-skipped TestPlayers suite + browser E2E.
